name: Shelter Signal V2 Manual Test Email Outline

nodes.name: HTTP Request
nodes.notes: Start Mailpit and the local bridge first with: docker compose up -d; python scripts/serve_daily_digest_dry_run.py. This request calls POST http://host.docker.internal:8787/dry-run?include_html=true and should return email_html. No Gmail, Google Cloud, real recipients, SMS, auth, or production behavior are used by this node.

parameters.subject: [TEST] Shelter Signal Daily Digest - manual local test

nodes.name: Email Send Placeholder (disabled)
nodes.notes: Disabled placeholder only. Configure SMTP credentials locally in n8n for Mailpit: host host.docker.internal, port 1025, secure false, no username/password unless n8n requires harmless placeholders test/test. Confirm email_html exists, use one local Mailpit recipient, keep the subject prefixed with [TEST] Shelter Signal Daily Digest, and do not activate or schedule the workflow. Do not use Gmail OAuth, Google Cloud, app passwords, real recipients, or production credentials.

parameters.content:
Manual test email safety checklist

1. Run docker compose up -d so Mailpit is available.
2. Run the HTTP Request node first.
3. Confirm status is ok and dry_run_result.result is PASS.
4. Confirm email_html exists and is not empty.
5. Configure Email Send only for local Mailpit SMTP.
6. Use exactly one placeholder recipient: test-recipient@example.local.
7. View the captured email at http://localhost:8025.
8. Keep the workflow inactive and unscheduled.
9. Do not commit credentials or real recipient addresses.

Expected HTTP output

{
  "status": "ok",
  "dry_run_result": { "result": "PASS" },
  "alert_candidate_count": 5,
  "email_html": "<!doctype html>...",
  "message": "PASS daily digest preview dry-run complete. No email was sent."
}

Mailpit SMTP settings
Host: host.docker.internal
Port: 1025
Secure: false
User/Password: empty, or test/test if n8n requires values

HTML body expression:
{{$json.email_html}}

Alternative:
{{$node["HTTP Request"].json["email_html"]}}
